title: C libraries should be avoided
description: C libraries should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode Smellmisra-c++2008Why is this an issue?More InfoThe use of C headers and therefore C functions in a C++ program, is sometimes necessary, but should be avoided in favor of C++ headers and functions.Noncompliant code example#include <string.h>Compliant solution#include <cstring> #include <string>Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Avoid including C libraries. Use C++ standard library equivalents instead.
